sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian’ Thubu ka um hi, Jesuh’ thusim kisutna;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lai Siangtho! Lai Siangtho! Ka up ka
Lai Siangtho! Lai Siangtho! Pasian’ Thubu ahi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: lungsim athuk dan, mihing le mawhna omzia;
I damna zong hong telgen in, Thubul pen ahi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh’ thu kicinna hi, Pasian’ hong piak ahi hi;
hong hilh hi, nuntakna bu ahi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Zan a meivak tang bangin, Na thu i n lungsim hong
Na dangte sangin manpha zaw hi, lungsim sung ka kem ding.
